title: soldanella minima f. cyclophylla
intro: Soldanella minima f. cyclophylla is a rare and unique alpine plant species, belonging to the Primulaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Soldanella minima f. cyclophylla is typically used in tinctures, infusions, and salves, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its rarity.
